args.query: SELECT * FROM "Order" WHERE datetime(substr(EffectiveDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 6, 2) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 9, 2)) >= datetime('2021-06-01') AND datetime(substr(EffectiveDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 6, 2) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 9, 2)) < datetime('2021-07-15') LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT * FROM "Order" WHERE datetime(substr(EffectiveDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 6, 2) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 9, 2)) >= datetime('2021-06-01') AND datetime(substr(EffectiveDate, 1, 4) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 6, 2) || '-' || substr(EffectiveDate, 9, 2)) < datetime('2021-07-15') LIMIT 20;
